_comment: First authenticated benchmark baseline, published 2026-06-29 at commit 640b7b1. METRIC IS RETRIEVAL QUALITY (gold recall@k / MRR over a real local semantic embedder), NOT end-to-end LLM-judged QA accuracy — no generative LLM runs in this harness. The nightly gate (.github/workflows/benchmarks-nightly.yml) compares subsequent runs against the `results` rows below; a recall@k regression beyond MNEMO_BENCH_REGRESSION_PP (default 3.0 pp) fails the job. Reproduce: `ollama pull nomic-embed-text && cargo run --release -p mnemo-locomo-bench --bin semantic_recall_bench`.

embedder.note: real local semantic embedder — never NoopEmbedding

token_efficiency.note: memory-layer token accounting only; QA accuracy needs a generative LLM (not run)

longmemeval_qa_accuracy.note: End-to-end LLM-judged QA accuracy (the Mem0/Letta/Hindsight leaderboard axis) is NOT measured here — requires a generative LLM + judge key. Left null on purpose; do not confuse with the retrieval rows above.
